nodes.itemHTML: • Koin - Lightweight dependency injection framework for Kotlin
• Event Gateway Getting Startedstars48 - Walkthrough application for using the Event Gateway.
• Official joke APIstars455 - Vue Jokester application backend.
• hhktonystars0 - Inspired by robbyrussell theme + ssh connection status prompt.
• Communities/forums: /r/selfhosted, IndieWeb
• Lists of software aimed at privacy and decentralization in some form: PRISM Break, privacytools.io, Alternative Internet, Libre Projects

• Adaptive Computation Time for Recurrent Neural Networks - Let RNNs decide how long they compute. I would love to see how well would it combines to Neural Turing Machines. Interesting interactive visualizations on the subject can be found here.
• Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Learning - Use a distance metric in the loss to determine to which class does an object belongs to from a few examples.

• Matching Networks for One Shot Learning - Interesting way of doing one-shot learning with low-data by using an attention mechanism and a query to compare an image to other images for classification.
• [Natural TTS Synthesis by Conditioning WaveNet on Mel Spectrogram
• Mobile Design Pattern Gallery: UI Patterns for Smartphone Apps - UI patterns which can be useful for mobile web apps.
• Workbox - JavaScript libraries for adding offline support to web apps.
• GTmetrix
• Neural Networks and Deep Learning - This book covers many of the core concepts behind neural networks and deep learning.
• Neural Machine Translation and Sequence-to-sequence Models: A Tutorial - Interesting overview of the subject of NMT, I mostly read part 8 about RNNs with attention as a refresher.
• U-Net: Convolutional Networks for Biomedical Image Segmentation - The U-Net is an encoder-decoder CNN that also has skip-connections, good for image segmentation at a per-pixel level.

• The One Hundred Layers Tiramisu: Fully Convolutional DenseNets for Semantic Segmentation - Merges the ideas of the U-Net and the DenseNet, this new neural network is especially good for huge datasets in image segmentation.

• Neural Machine Translation by Jointly Learning to Align and Translate - Attention mechanism for LSTMs! Mostly, figures and formulas and their explanations revealed to be useful to me. I gave a talk on that paper here.
• Neural Turing Machines - Outstanding for letting a neural network learn an algorithm with seemingly good generalization over long time dependencies. Sequences recall problem.
• Show, Attend and Tell: Neural Image Caption Generation with Visual Attention - LSTMs' attention mechanisms on CNNs feature maps does wonders.
• Teaching Machines to Read and Comprehend - A very interesting and creative work about textual question answering, what a breakthrough, there is something to do with that.
• Effective Approaches to Attention-based Neural Machine Translation - Exploring different approaches to attention mechanisms.

• Google’s Neural Machine Translation System: Bridging the Gap between Human and Machine Translation - In 2016: stacked residual LSTMs with attention mechanisms on encoder/decoder are the best for NMT (Neural Machine Translation).
• Hybrid computing using a neural network with dynamic external memory - Improvements on differentiable memory based on NTMs: now it is the Differentiable Neural Computer (DNC).
• Massive Exploration of Neural Machine Translation Architectures - That yields intuition about the boundaries of what works for doing NMT within a framed seq2seq problem formulation.
• ImageDetectstars291 - Detect and crop faces, barcodes and texts in image with iOS 11 Vision API.

• CS 189 Introduction To Machine Learning UC Berkeley
    • Introductory ML course covering a wide range of topics: ranging from least squares to convolutional neural networks
    • Notes
    • Homework
• Free Software Movement Karnataka - Group in Bengaluru, India that spreads awareness about free software.
• Free Software Movement of India - Coalition of free software organizations in India.
• Pimgstars98 - Progressive Image Component; Used for lazy loading images.
• Handling Static Forms, Auth & Serverless Functions with Gatsby on Netlify
• TensorFlow.js - A WebGL accelerated, browser based JavaScript library for training and deploying ML models.
• ember-root-urlstars11 - A template helper to keep your URLs relative to the app's rootURL.
• markgatestars4 - Allows you to mark directories so you can jump directly to them.
• CSS Transitions and Transforms for Beginners - An introduction to to CSS transitions and CSS (2D) transforms.
• CSS 3D transforms - Multi page tutorial with examples like card flip and carousel effects.
• CSS Animation for Beginners - Imparts the concepts of CSS animations with keyframes.
• animatable - Nice little page demonstrating which CSS properties are animatable.
• EasyTransitionsstars1.5k - A simple way to create custom interactive UIViewController transitions.
• CompCert - Fully-verified C compiler. Supports almost all of C89. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• Intel SPMD - Compiler for a variant of the C language, for single program, multiple data programming. Various licenses
• lz4 - Fast Compression algorithm.
• quicklz - Fast compression library. GNU GPL2.1
• libgcrypt - General-purpose cryptography library, with a range of available ciphers. GNU LGPL2.1or later (code) and GNU GPL2.1 or later (manual and tools)
• libsodium - Modern and easy-to-use crypto library. Expat
• libtomcrypt - Fairly comprehensive, modular and portable cryptographic toolkit. Public Domain
• sophia - Modern, embeddable key-value database. FreeBSD
• Qt Creator - Cross-platform IDE written with C++ and Qt, part of the Qt SDK. Supports Clang Code Model. GNU GPL3 with Qt exception
• Amazon FreeRTOS - RTOS for microcontrollers that makes small, low-power edge devices easy to program. MIT
• Contiki - Connect low-cost, low power microcontrollers to the Internet. 3-clause BSD
• C Algorithms - Collection of common algorithms and data structures for C. ISC
• EFL - Large collection of useful data structures and functions.
• qlibc - Simple and powerful C library, designed as a replacement for GLib while focusing on being small and light. qLib license (similar to FreeBSD)
• ioquake3 - The Quake3 engine, freed at last. GNU GPL2.1
• Orx - Portable, lightweight, plugin-based, data-driven, 2D-oriented game engine. zlib
• Chipmunk2D - Fast and lightweight 2D game physics library. Expat
• FreeGLUT - Alternative to the OpenGL Utility Toolkit. Allows the creation and management of windows with OpenGL contexts. X11
• libao - Cross-platform audio library with a wide variety of outputs. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• SDL and SDL2 - Cross-platform development library designed to provide low-level access to audio, keyboard, mouse, joystick and graphics hardware via OpenGL. SDL2 is the most current version. zlib
• klib - Small and lightweight implementations of common algorithms and data structures. MIT
• WJElement - Advanced JSON manipulation library, with support for JSON Schema. LGPL, any version
• jemalloc - General purpose malloc(3) implementation that emphasizes fragmentation avoidance and scalable concurrency support, commonly used in production systems. FreeBSD
• libmpv - Music-playing library. Compile with ./waf configure --disable-cplayer --enable-libmpv-shared to not have the music player. GNU GPL2.1 or later
• libsoundio - Library for cross-platform, real-time audio input and output. Has a range of back-ends. Expat
• czmq - High-level binding for ZeroMQ. MPL2.0
• libuv - Cross-platform asynchronous I/O. Expat
• lwan - Experimental, scalable, high-performance HTTP server. GNU GPL2.1
• mongoose - Embedded web server for C. GNU GPL2.1
• balde - Microframework for C based on GLib. GNU LGPLv2.1
• kore - Easy to use, scalable and secure web application framework for writing web APIs in C.
• klone - KLone is a fully-featured, multiplatform, web application development framework.
• apophenia - Library for statistical and scientific computing. GNU GPL2.1
• ck - Concurrency primitives, safe memory reclamation mechanisms and non-blocking data structures. FreeBSD
• libdill - Structured concurrency in C. X11
• shoco - Compressor for small text strings. Expat
• CHEAT - Very simple unit testing framework. FreeBSD
• CMock - Mock/stub generator for C. Expat
• Unity - Simple unit testing framework for C. Expat

• LuaStudio - Free game development tool/engine. Create games and other graphic focused apps on Windows using Lua/LuaJIT programming language. Export them to many platforms including iOS, Android and Mac.
• tidy_exstars9 - Elixir binding to the granddaddy of HTML tools http://www.html-tidy.org.
• getatrexstars5 - Automatic translation tool of Gettext locales with Google Translate for Elixir/Phoenix projects.
• mockingbirdstars3 - A set of helpers to test code that involves http requests.
• cocktailstars94 - Elixir date recurrence library based on iCalendar events.
• plug_canonical_hoststars21 - Plug to ensure all requests are served from a single canonical host.
• feedxstars9 - Add social feed functionality to current applications. Exemplify OTP umbrella app, with 3 apps. Thin phoenix controllers.
• Kazanstars129 - Kubernetes client for Elixir, generated from the k8s open API specifications.
• pwnedstars16 - Check if your password has been pwned.
• gen_rmqstars147 - Set of behaviours meant to be used to create RabbitMQ consumers and publishers.
• shopifystars86 - Easily access the Shopify API.
• rr - Debugger that records non-deterministic executions to allow for deterministic debugging. FreeBSD
• libusb - Generic access to USB devices. LGPL2.1
• SugarRecordstars2.1k - Helps with Core Data and Realm.
• MIDI to PICO-8stars46 - A tool to convert MIDI files to PICO-8 music.
• Autopsy - A digital forensics platform and graphical interface to The Sleuth Kit and other digital forensics tools
• Awesome bug bounty resources by EdOverflowstars3.3k
• Movies For Hackersstars8.7k - A curated list of movies every hacker & cyberpunk must watch.
• Awesome Humane Techstars1.7k - List of projects focusing on ethics, transparency, and privacy.
• Write.as - Cross-platform writing and publishing tool that supports Markdown and editing / deleting past posts.
• jsonstore.io - jsonstore.io offers free, secured JSON based API endpoints for small projects. It supports common types of HTTP operations like POST, GET, PUT, DELETE etc.
• baked_file_systemstars142 - Virtual file system implementation
• hardwarestars53 - Get CPU, Memory and Network informations of the running OS and its processes
• Slack – Text, voice, and video chat system with loads of integration options including ScreenHero, a real-time, HD screen sharing system for collaboration in teams
• vue-router-user-rolesstars236 - Protects routes based on user roles. Add your own authentication.
• sensu-plugins-influxdbstars18 - Sensu InfluxDB Plugins

nodes.itemHTML: • awesome-microservicesstars10.2k
• c4gostars259 - Transpile C code to Go code.

• mx-honeystars5 - Provides completions for mxstars125; a command-line tool used for the development of Graal projects. It's meant to improve the usual workflow build unittest benchmark ... ease discovery and provide handy aliases.
• carthagestars1 - Provides completions and aliases for use with Carthagestars14.3k.
• ember-styleguidestars72
• Softlayer Ember.jsstars39
• Netguru Ember.js
• DockYard Ember.js
• Swift for Scriptingstars151 - A hand-curated collection of useful and informative scripting material.
• TraceLogstars49 🐧 - Dead Simple: logging the way it's meant to be! Runs on iOS, macOS, and Linux.
• TheChernoProject - Introduction to OpenGL in C++
• assimpstars6.5k - Portable library to import 3D models in a uniform manner.
• CodeXLstars956 - AMD's tool suite that includes debugger, profiler and frame/shader analysis.
• Local Storagestars3 – Storage driver using local filesystem.
• eb-demo-php-simple-app 🔥stars137 - Simple PHP app.
• User Manager Servicestars68 – A small, useful user manager made for production application setups.
• slowpokestars98 - Key-value store with persistence.
• agendastars7.5k - MongoDB-backed job scheduling.

• NYPL Digital Collections - [©️] (https://www.nypl.org/help/about-nypl/legal-notices/website-terms-and-conditions) 180.000 items are Public Domain since January 6th 2016 Public Domain Collections: Free to Share & Reuse
• Learn CSS Layout - Learn about CSS layout techniques in 5 chapters.
• Grid Garden - Lovely game where you write CSS code to grow your carrot garden.
• Graph Theory and Networks in Biology (preprint; IET Systems Biology, 2007).
• Mondstars240 - A dynamically typed scripting language written in C# with a REPL, debugger, and simple embedding API.
• Fernostars45 – Vapor Firebase Realtime database provider.
• emr-bootstrap-actions 🔥🔥🔥stars598 - Sample bootstrap actions.
• MalPipestars93 - Malware/IOC ingestion and processing engine, that enriches collected data.
• Creative Text Effects with CSS: Mandy Michael, Talk.CSS 40:46
• gcalclistars2.5k - Google Calendar command line interface
• homeeToMqttstars8 - Bidirectional Interface between homee and MQTT.
• Developing ember apps on glitch.com
• ember-cli-dependency-lintstars74 - Lint your app's addon dependencies, making sure you only have one version of each.
• moxystars22 - A Golang MQTT proxy providing useful output traces to monitor and troubleshoot your MQTT communications.
• Crocstars124 - A lightweight Emoji parsing and querying library.
• BlockiesSwiftstars48 - Unique blocky identicons/profile picture generator.

• Toronto Transit Explorerstars35 - A Java application that visualizes transit, biking and walking accessibility across the city of Toronto. Live version hosted here. Uses a modified version of R5stars157 for routing.
• vue-next-level-scrollstars49 - A component based and SSR ready approach to smooth scrolling using the modern Scroll behavior API
• vue-persian-datetime-pickerstars397 Persian material datepicker. Supports datetime, date, time, year, month.
• CDK (Chemistry Development Kit) - Algorithms for structural chemo- and bioinformatics, implemented in Java.
• JChemPaintstars75 - Chemical 2D structure editor application/applet based on the Chemistry Development Kit.
• SpriteKitEasingSwiftstars104 - Better Easing for SpriteKit.
• MapViewPlusstars157 - Use any custom view as custom callout view for MKMapView with cool animations. Use any image as annotation view.
• ember-cli-string-helpersstars69 - Set of the String helpers extracted from DockYard's ember-composable-helpers.
• A collection of links that summarize EmberConf 2017stars100
• A collection of links that summarize EmberConf 2016stars272
• A collection of links that summarize EmberConf 2015stars246
• ember-wormholestars286 - Render a child view somewhere else in the DOM.
• Laravel Live UK
• Laying Out The Future With Grid And Flexbox - Introduction of a new layout system encompassing Flexbox, CSS Grid and the Box Alignment Module.

• GeneticSharpstars833 - Multi-platform genetic algorithm library for .NET Core and .NET Framework. The library has several implementations of GA operators, like: selection, crossover, mutation, reinsertion and termination.

• ML.NETstars7.5k - ML.NET is a cross-platform open-source machine learning framework which makes machine learning accessible to .NET developers. ML.NET was originally developed in Microsoft Research and evolved into a significant framework over the last decade and is used across many product groups in Microsoft like Windows, Bing, PowerPoint, Excel and more.
• Vulpesstars115 - Deep belief and deep learning implementation written in F# and leverages CUDA GPU execution with Alea.cuBase.
• Vapor reCAPTCHAstars10 – Validate Google reCAPTCHAs using Vapor.
• Vapor Request Storagestars7 – A replacement for request.storage which was available in Vapor 1 & 2.
• OpenFaaS - Serverless Functions Made Simple for Docker & Kubernetes. (Source Codestars19.7k) MIT Go
• Dialogflow - Build natural and rich conversational experiences.
• The cascade - This article explains what the cascade is and how this affects you.
• mqtt-shellstars16 - A simple interactive shell for MQTT.
• Specificity and inheritance - Understanding specificity and inheritance is important to master CSS. This article will help.

• CSS Box Model - An article explaining the foundation of layout on the web.
    • Also have a look at the detailed information about the box-sizing property.
• Introduction to CSS - This Screencast series will teach you the basics of CSS in about one hour.
• CSS Variables: Why Should You Care? - A short introduction to CSS variables.
• Locally Scoped CSS Variables: What, How, and Why - Describes the advantages of locally scoped CSS variables.
• Using CSS variables correctly - Patterns and anti-patterns for using CSS variables.
• Everything you need to know about CSS Variables - In depth article going beyond the basics of CSS Variables using real-world examples.
• Getting Reactive with CSS - Mindblowing talk about the possibilities of the combination of CSS variables and functional reactive programming in JavaScript.
• React and React Native State Museum
• Basic CSS Selectors - An introducing to the very basic CSS selectors you need to know.
• Advanced CSS Selectors - Level up your knowledge. From attribute selectors to CSS3 pseudo classes.
• Docker CE = free product release based on Moby
• Docker EE = commercial product release based on Docker CE.
• Glancesstars18.3k - A cross-platform curses-based system monitoring tool written in Python by @nicolargo
• Calico-Dockerstars910 - Calico is a pure layer 3 virtual network that allows containers over multiple docker-hosts to talk to each other.
• Marathonstars4k - Marathon is a private PaaS built on Mesos. It automatically handles hardware or software failures and ensures that an app is "always on"
• Mesosstars4.8k - Resource/Job scheduler for containers, VM's and physical hosts @apache

• Amazon EC2 Container Registry 💲 - Amazon EC2 Container Registry (ECR) is a fully-managed Docker container registry that makes it easy for developers to store, manage, and deploy Docker container images.
• Cycle.io 💲 - Bare-metal container hosting.
• GCE Container Registry 💲 Fast, private Docker image storage on Google Cloud Platform
• JFrog Artifactory 💲 - Artifact Repository Manager, can be used as private Docker Registry as well
• Quay.io 💲 (part of CoreOS) - Secure hosting for private Docker repositories
• Buddy 💲 - The best of Git, build & deployment tools combined into one powerful tool that supercharged our development.
• subuserstars846 - Makes it easy to securely and portably run graphical desktop applications in Docker
• Turbostars23 - Simple and Powerful utility for docker. By @ramitsurana

• ESLint (label: good first issue)
    A fully pluggable tool for identifying and reporting on patterns in JavaScript.

• LightTable (label: good first issue)
    The Next Generation code editor! One of the top funded projects on KickStarter.

• Matomo (label: help wanted)
    Matomo is the leading Free/Libre open analytics platform.

• Fastify (label: good first issue)
    Fast and low overhead web framework, for Node.js.

• Node.js core (label: good first issue)
    JavaScript runtime built on Chrome's V8 JavaScript engine

• scrapy (label: good first issue)
    A fast high-level web crawling & scraping framework for Python.
• Icestars347 – A developer friendly package manager for Swift; 100% compatible with Swift Package Manager.
• SDPokerstars22 - CLI tool and library for testing SMPTE ST2110 SDP files.
• Awesome Container Securitystars5 - A curated list of awesome resources related to container building and runtime security
• Floats - In depth information about how to use (and clear) floats.
• Positioning Types - A closer look at a few little-known things related to the CSS positioning layout method.
• inline-block - Shows in which cases it makes sense to use the display property inline-block for layouting.
• Can I use - Interactive browser support tables for CSS (and HTML5).
• Curassowstars396 🐧 - HTTP server using the pre-fork worker model.
• Stencilstars2k - Simple and powerful template language.
• dadastars54 for Dhall - a library for recursion schemes in Dhall.
• Elixir Outlaws - Panel discussions of topics in and around Elixir development.
• NCrunch - An automated continuous & concurrent testing tool for Visual Studio. [$]
• Crossertech - Provides a great set of tools for you to build real-time applications on the Microsoft.NET plattform and much more. [$]
• Microsoft Ajax Minifier - Contains JS and CSS minifiers which have a highest performance, because its have been specifically designed for .NET. Optionally produce Source Maps for JS code.
• MSBuild ILMerge task - MSBuild ILMerge task is a NuGet package allows you to use the famous ILMerge utility in automated builds and/or Visual Studio projects.
• MVVM Light Toolkitstars989 - The main purpose of the toolkit is to accelerate the creation and development of MVVM applications in WPF, Silverlight, Windows Store (RT) and for Windows Phone
• EPPlusstars3.4k - EPPlus is a .NET library that reads and writes Excel 2007/2010 files using the Open Office XML format (xlsx).
• Rx.NETstars4.9k - The Reactive Extensions (Rx) is a library for composing asynchronous and event-based programs using observable sequences and LINQ-style query operators
• VSColorOutput - Color highlighting for Build, Find and Debug output windows. Custom match patterns and colors can be added.
• WebSocket4NET - WebSocket client for .NET 2.0+, Xamarin, Mono, Silverlight, Windows Phone, & WinRT
• WampSharpstars358 - A C# implementation of The Web Application Messaging Protocol - a protocol that provides messaging patterns of Remote Procedure Calls and Publish/Subscribe over WebSockets.

• Bundle Transformerstars92 - Modular extension for Microsoft ASP.NET Web Optimization Framework. Its modules supports LESS, Sass, CoffeeScript, TypeScript, Mustache, Handlebars, Autoprefixer along with a bunch of different JS and CSS minifiers.
• DotNetZip.Semverdstars406 - An open-source project that delivers a .NET library for handling ZIP files, and some associated tools. (fork of Unmaintained DotNetZip)
• HashLib - HashLib is a collection of nearly all hash algorithms you've ever seen, it supports almost everything and is very easy to use
• Reactive ETL - Reactive ETL is a rewrite of Rhino ETL using the reactive extensions for .NET
• Xer.Cqrsstars94 - A simple library for creating applications based on the CQRS pattern with support for attribute routing and hosted handlers. Developed in C# targeting .NET Standard 1.0.
• Live-Chartsstars4.8k - An Animated, MVVM oriented and modern charting library
• Office Ribbonstars564 - A library that implements MS Office Ribbon for WinForms.
• Refitstars5k - The automatic type-safe REST library for Xamarin and .NET
• WkhtmlToPdfstars242 - C# wrapper around wkhtmltopdf console utility. Allow to generate preety PDF using HTML and CSS.
• Cinchoo ETLstars386 - ETL Framework for .NET (Read / Write CSV, Flat, Xml, JSON, Key-Value formatted files)
• algorithmsstars512 - Algorithms and data structures.CLRS study.
